name: get_transcript
description: Fetch cleaned subtitles as plain text for a video (YouTube, X, Instagram, TikTok, Twitch, Vimeo, Facebook, Bilibili, VK, Dailymotion). Uses auto-discovery for type/language.

arguments.name: url
arguments.desc: Video URL or YouTube video ID

name: get_raw_subtitles
description: Fetch raw subtitle file content (SRT/VTT) with pagination support

arguments.name: url
arguments.desc: Video URL or YouTube video ID

arguments.name: type
arguments.desc: Subtitle track type: official or auto

arguments.name: next_cursor
arguments.desc: Cursor from previous response for pagination

name: get_available_subtitles
description: List which languages are available for a video (official vs auto-generated)

arguments.name: url
arguments.desc: Video URL or YouTube video ID

name: get_video_info
description: Fetch extended metadata about a video (title, channel, duration, views, etc.)

arguments.name: url
arguments.desc: Video URL or YouTube video ID

name: get_video_chapters
description: Get chapter markers with start/end time and title

arguments.name: url
arguments.desc: Video URL or YouTube video ID

name: get_playlist_transcripts
description: Fetch transcripts for multiple videos in a playlist

arguments.name: url
arguments.desc: Playlist URL or watch URL with list= parameter

arguments.name: type
arguments.desc: Subtitle track type: official or auto

arguments.name: maxItems
arguments.desc: Max number of videos to fetch

name: search_videos
description: Search videos on YouTube via yt-dlp (ytsearch)

arguments.name: uploadDateFilter
arguments.desc: Filter: hour, today, week, month, year
